topics.topic_en: Constraints on Specialization and Generalization (Disjointness & Completeness)
topics.query_en: EER diagram constraints disjoint overlapping total partial tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح قيود EER diagram disjoint overlapping total partial
topics.reason: Students often confuse the four combinations of disjointness and completeness constraints and struggle to identify which to apply in real-world scenarios.

topics.topic_en: Categories and UNION Types in EER Diagrams
topics.topic_ar: الفئات وأنواع الاتحاد في مخططات EER
topics.query_en: EER diagram categories UNION types explained
topics.query_ar: شرح Categories UNION types EER diagram قواعد بيانات
topics.reason: Differentiating between a shared subclass (multiple inheritance) and a category (union type) is conceptually confusing for beginners.

topics.topic_en: ER-to-Relational Mapping Algorithm (Handling Weak Entities and Multi-valued Attributes)
topics.topic_ar: خوارزمية تحويل ER إلى نموذج علائقي (الكيانات الضعيفة والسمات متعددة القيم)
topics.query_en: ER to Relational mapping algorithm weak entities multi-valued attributes
topics.query_ar: شرح تحويل ER to Relational mapping weak entity multivalued
topics.reason: Memorizing and correctly applying the distinct foreign key rules for weak entities and creating new tables for multi-valued attributes requires high attention to detail.

topics.topic_en: Mapping EER Specialization and Generalization to Relational Schema
topics.topic_ar: تحويل التخصيص والتعميم إلى جداول علائقية
topics.query_en: Mapping EER specialization generalization to relational schema options
topics.query_ar: شرح تحويل EER إلى Relational schema specialization generalization
topics.reason: Choosing the correct mapping strategy among the four available options depends heavily on correctly interpreting the underlying disjointness and completeness constraints.

topics.topic_en: Mapping Categories (UNION Types) to Relational Schema
topics.topic_ar: تحويل الفئات (أنواع الاتحاد) إلى جداول علائقية
topics.query_en: Mapping categories UNION types to relational database surrogate key
topics.query_ar: شرح تحويل Categories UNION types إلى جداول قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Creating surrogate keys and correctly linking the category relation to its superclasses when they have different primary keys is highly complex.
